overview.description: The T-REX 2X Long SNOW Daily Target ETF (SNOU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement ofSnowflake Inc.stock (NYSE: SNOW), less fees and expenses. SNOU was launched on Apr 24, 2025 and is issued by Tuttle Capital Management.
